text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser and I are on our way back
after a day out when she comes to a sudden stop.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, we've really made the most out of today!
Thanks so much, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: By the way... Do you have any plans later?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Really?! Then, let's go to the shopping district!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, it's time for "you know what." I cordially
invite you to your hospitality tour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go along with Matikanetannhauser's invitation,
and we head to the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I wanna check out that shop over there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Taiyaki! Taiyakiii! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look at this! They're filling them with thirty
percent more red-bean paste right now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: It's not thirty percent off, it's thirty percent on! We've got to buy some!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Oh. Uh-oh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I forgot my wallet.
No! My beautiful taiyakiii!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What? Really?! Woohoo! Your heart's even bigger
than these super-stuffed taiyaki!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, all right! Let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Nom, nom, nom! Chomp!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Ow! Hot, hot, hot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thwump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is so startled by the intense
heat of the taiyaki that she ends up falling flat on
her rear.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Owww...
Yeesh, I wasn't expecting it to be so scorching...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Good idea! Let's bounce on over to the park!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time we finish eating our taiyaki in the
park, the sun has already begun to set.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder when the hospitality is supposed to
start...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That was some good taiyaki. Okay, then...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Let's head home before it gets dark!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, surprised, huh? I called it a hospitality
tour even though all we did was walk through the
shopping district like normal.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But that's my style of hospitality!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm so normal and ordinary. There's
nothing at all that stands out about me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But even knowing that, you still scouted me.
That's why I thought it would be best to just be
my ordinary self.
choice_data_list: You might be right about that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And while special days are really fun, it's the
ordinary day-to-day that I love the most!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's why I thought ordinary was best for today
too! Hooray for being ordinary! Hip, hip, mun!
choice_data_list: Here's to being ordinary! Hip, hip, mun!
Here's to being ordinary! Hip, hip, mun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's why I thought ordinary was best for today
too! Hooray for being ordinary! Hip, hip, mun!
choice_data_list: Here's to being ordinary! Hip, hip, mun!
Here's to being ordinary! Hip, hip, mun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! That's so kind of you to say! I'm so happy I
can hardly speak!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now I've got the feeling I need to do something
even more amazing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But that's too tall an order for me. Ahaha.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Still, Trainer... Please keep supporting ordinary
old me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yay! I'm so glad you feel the same!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's always so exciting when I'm with you, even
when everything is perfectly ordinary.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
How can I say this... It's like you take ordinary up
a notch or two.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, let's keep things turned up from here on
out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Then, today we celebrate staying the same...
Hehehe, it feels like we ought to make a toast.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but we don't have any drinks. Agh, I messed
things up again.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I guess we can have a spiritual toast! How about a
fist bump?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Cheeeeers!
